channel.title: GlobeNewswire - Earnings Releases and Operating Results

item.title: InterDigital Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Financial Results
item.description: WILMINGTON, Del., March 12, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- InterDigital, Inc. reported revenue of $178.4 million for the fourth quarter of 2025 and $502.1 million for the full year. The company also announced updated guidance for fiscal 2026.
item.dc:creator: InterDigital, Inc.

item.title: Tilray Brands Reports Third Quarter Fiscal 2026 Financial Results
item.description: Tilray Brands, Inc. reported net revenue of $230.3 million for the third quarter of fiscal year 2026, an increase of 12% compared to the prior year period.
item.dc:creator: Tilray Brands, Inc.

item.title: BioAtla Announces Hostile Takeover Bid from Global Pharma Corp
item.description: SAN DIEGO, March 12, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- BioAtla, Inc. today confirmed that it has received an unsolicited hostile takeover bid from Global Pharma Corp valued at approximately $1.2 billion.
item.dc:creator: BioAtla, Inc.

item.title: Enerplus Resources Fund Provides Operational Update
item.description: Enerplus Resources Fund provides an update on operations and production for the current quarter.
item.dc:creator: Enerplus Resources Fund
